labor_share.method: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 621491 ($28,743,039,632) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 621491 ($39,124,447,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: 6-digit. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).

n_band.derivation: margin 0.1580 (margins.json[62]: Damodaran Jan 2026: Hospitals/Healthcare Facilities EBITDA/Sales 15.80% (closest named bucket for provider economics; public support-services bucket at 3.87% reflects a different business model)); revenue/employee $254,604 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 621491); class <5: 82 firms, avg revenue/firm $599,951 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $94,792 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 25 firms, avg revenue/firm $712,480 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $112,572 -> out of $1-10M band; class 10-19: 11 firms, avg revenue/firm $2,878,182 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $454,753 -> out of $1-10M band; class 20-99: 4 firms, avg revenue/firm $2,945,000 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $465,310 -> out of $1-10M band; class 100-499: 4 firms, avg revenue/firm $26,750,250 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $4,226,540 -> IN $1-10M band; class 500+: 20 firms, avg revenue/firm $1,945,349,900 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $307,365,284 -> out of $1-10M band; n_band = 4
